dict.string: $(EXECUTABLE_NAME)
AppIcon
AppIcon
$(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER)
$(PRODUCT_NAME)
APPL
$(MACOSX_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET)
A program running inside Deckard would like to access AppleScript.
A program running inside Deckard would like to access Bluetooth.
A program running inside Deckard would like to access your calendar data.
A program running inside Deckard would like to access the camera.
A program running inside Deckard would like to access your contacts.
Deckard needs access to your Desktop folder to open projects and run terminal sessions in those directories.
Deckard needs access to your Documents folder to open projects and run terminal sessions in those directories.
Deckard needs access to your Downloads folder to open projects and run terminal sessions in those directories.
A program running inside Deckard would like to access the local network.
A program running inside Deckard would like to access your location information.
A program running inside Deckard would like to access the microphone.
A program running inside Deckard would like to access your photo library.
NSApplication
A program running inside Deckard would like to access your reminders.
A program running inside Deckard would like to access speech recognition.
A program running inside Deckard requires elevated privileges.
https://github.com/gi11es/deckard/releases/latest/download/appcast.xml
v0PhN0MJ3zWoKhQpY+dbvL7sX8nH1XehiL4w+Do4Jog=
